pre_register.title: Pre-Register Campaign - Hewe Hotel & Club
pre_register.subtitle: Pre-register and receive special offers when buying AQE tokens
pre_register.comm_note: * Commission is only received after successful transaction
pre_register.alert_desc: To ensure transparency, you MUST complete & receive Admin approval for KYC Step 1 before making a payment. Transactions are made directly from your personal wallet to the system wallet.
pre_register.ref_card_desc: Share your link and earn attractive rewards from your network.
pre_register.pay_min_error: Tier 1 payment must be at least 30% ({{min}} USDT)
pre_register.pay_confirm_toast: Please confirm the transaction in your personal wallet...
pre_register.pay_sent_toast: Transaction sent! Waiting for Blockchain confirmation...
pre_register.pay_completed_msg: Congratulations! You have fulfilled 100% of your payment obligation for this campaign.
pre_register.kyc_verified_required: Admin must approve your KYC Step 1 to proceed with payment.
pre_register.connect_to_pay_hint: Please connect your wallet to proceed with payment

balance_history.title: Balances History
balance_history.subtitle: Track all transactions in your account
balance_history.search_placeholder: Search by transaction ID or description...

header.select_language_desc: Choose your preferred language for the system experience.

confirm_email.verifying_desc: Please wait a moment while we activate your account.
confirm_email.success_desc: Your account has been successfully activated. Benefit from all the features of AQ Estate today.
confirm_email.error_desc: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Please try again or contact support.

kyc.title: Identity Verification (KYC)
kyc.subtitle: Complete the verification steps to secure your account and unlock full trading features.
kyc.security_note_desc: We are committed to absolute security of your personal data according to international standards. This information is only used for identity verification and fraud prevention purposes.

steps.step_1_desc: Upload ID/Passport photos to unlock payment rights.
steps.step_2_desc: Register your face with FaceTec to unlock withdrawal rights.
steps.step_3_desc: Activate 2-factor authentication (2FA) to enhance security when logging in.

id_verification.note: Note: Photos must be clear, not glared, and show all 4 corners of the document.

facescan.title: Face Verification
facescan.desc: Please complete ID verification before performing this step.
facescan.standard: Utilizing FaceTec technology to ensure identity authenticity.

google_auth.title: 2-Factor Authentication (2FA)
google_auth.desc: Scan the QR code using Google Authenticator or Authy app.
google_auth.instructions: Please save this secret key in a safe place. You will need it to recover 2FA if you lose your phone.

errors.step_locked: Please complete the previous step to continue.

status.pending_desc: Your information has been submitted. Admin is checking, please check back later.
status.verified_desc: You have successfully completed this step!

referrals.subtitle: Manage and track your affiliate network
